name: dynamic-pricing-demand-intelligence
description: Dynamic Pricing & Demand Intelligence System monorepo.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,flask -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" "cd python_service && python app.py"
scripts.test:assistant: node server/src/test/assistant.test.mjs && node server/src/test/assistant-state.test.mjs && node server/src/test/assistant-controller.test.mjs && node server/src/test/assistant-milk-flow.test.mjs
scripts.test:reliability: npm run test:matching && npm run test:fitness && npm run test:trust && npm run test:quality-gate && npm run test:assistant
